decisions.decision: Use PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM instead of MongoDB
decisions.rationale: Need ACID compliance for financial transactions, complex relational queries, and strong type safety with Prisma
alternatives_considered: Supabase (considered for future if need hosted)
decisions.impact: All data models must use relational schema. Migration files required for schema changes. Requires PostgreSQL in production.

decisions.decision: Use Next.js 15 App Router instead of Pages Router
decisions.rationale: Better RSC support, improved performance, server actions for mutations, cleaner data fetching patterns
decisions.impact: All routes use app/ directory structure. Server components by default. Client components marked with 'use client'.

decisions.decision: Use Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui component library
decisions.rationale: Utility-first CSS for consistency, shadcn provides accessible components we own (not dependency), TypeScript-first
decisions.impact: All styling uses Tailwind utilities. Components copied from shadcn, customized in components/ui/. No CSS-in-JS.

decisions.decision: Adopt 2-week sprint cycles with locked scope
decisions.rationale: Need predictable delivery for stakeholder demos. 2 weeks balances flexibility and planning overhead.
alternatives_considered: Kanban flow (rejected: need predictability for demos)
Monthly milestones (rejected: feedback loop too slow)
decisions.impact: Sprint planning every 2 weeks. Scope locked on Day 0. Daily updates required. Retrospectives mandatory.

decisions.decision: Use Vitest instead of Jest for testing
decisions.rationale: Native ESM support, faster, better Vite integration, compatible with existing Jest tests via compatibility layer
alternatives_considered: Playwright only (rejected: need unit tests too)
decisions.impact: All tests use Vitest. vitest.config.ts for configuration. npm test runs Vitest. Playwright for E2E.

decisions.decision: Use JWT with httpOnly cookies for authentication
decisions.rationale: Balance security (XSS protection via httpOnly) and simplicity (stateless auth). Refresh token rotation for security.
decisions.impact: Tokens stored in httpOnly cookies. Middleware validates on every request. Refresh endpoint at /api/auth/refresh.

decisions.decision: Adopt bead method for all feature development
decisions.rationale: Reduces stress, ensures working code always, enables easy pivots, improves commit history for debugging
alternatives_considered: Feature branches (rejected: leads to big bang merges)
TDD only (rejected: too rigid for exploration)
No structure (rejected: leads to broken intermediate states)
decisions.impact: All features decomposed into 15-45 min beads. Commit after each bead. BEAD_CHAIN.md for planning. 8-12 commits/day expected.

decisions.decision: Deploy to Vercel for frontend, Railway for backend services
decisions.rationale: Vercel optimized for Next.js. Railway simple for PostgreSQL and background workers. Both have good free tiers.
alternatives_considered: All on Railway (rejected: Vercel better for Next.js)
decisions.impact: CI/CD via GitHub Actions. Vercel auto-deploys from main. Railway deploys backend services. Staging + production environments.
